title: froesiodendron urceocalyx
intro: Froesiodendron urceocalyx, also known as the 'urn-flask tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, native to New Guinea. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Froesiodendron urceocalyx include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be utilized for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
